feature.name: Mode 1: Excessive Rate of Descent
feature.description: The Mode 1 alert is intended to generate caution alerts and time-critical warning alerts when the aircraft has a high rate of descent relative to its height above terrain. Mode 1 is active during all segments of flight. In order to reduce nuisance alerts during steep approaches, an optional set of alerting curves may be employed when the aircraft is performing a steep approach. The determination if a steep approach is in progress can either be based on an input to the Equipment (such as a pilot-activated steep approach switch) or it can be based on internal logic (such as comparison of aircraft position to approach profiles in a database).

steps.text: the plane is flying

resolution.generation_hint: Establish that the aircraft is in a flying state before testing Mode 1 alerting behavior.

steps.text: Mode 1 shall be armed

resolution.generation_hint: Assert that Mode 1 has been armed and is ready to evaluate descent rate conditions.

steps.text: Mode 1 is armed

resolution.generation_hint: Prepare Mode 1 so that it is armed and capable of generating alerts.

steps.text: Mode 1 is not inhibited

resolution.generation_hint: Confirm that Mode 1 inhibition is off so the envelope logic is active.

steps.text: steep approach is not selected

resolution.keyword_name: Ensure Steep Approach Is Not Selected
resolution.generation_hint: Confirm that steep approach mode is not selected, so the standard caution envelope applies.

steps.text: the rate of descent is at least <rate of descent> feet per minute

resolution.generation_hint: Set the aircraft's rate of descent to the specified value in feet per minute.

steps.text: the height above terrain is between 100 and <height> feet

resolution.generation_hint: Set the aircraft's height above terrain to the specified value in feet.

steps.text: a Mode 1 caution alert is emitted within 2 seconds

resolution.keyword_name: Verify Mode 1 Caution Alert Is Emitted
resolution.generation_hint: Assert that a Mode 1 caution alert is emitted within 2 seconds of the descent rate and height conditions being met.

scenarios.name: Must Not Alert when not Armed

steps.text: Mode 1 is not armed

resolution.generation_hint: Ensure Mode 1 is disarmed so that no alerting conditions are evaluated.

resolution.generation_hint: Assert that no Mode 1 caution alert is emitted while Mode 1 remains disarmed.

steps.text: Mode 1 is inhibited

resolution.generation_hint: Inhibit Mode 1 so that it is armed but will not generate any alerts regardless of conditions.

steps.text: a Mode 1 caution alert is not emitted at all

resolution.generation_hint: Assert that no Mode 1 caution alert is emitted while Mode 1 is inhibited.

steps.text: steep approach is not selected

resolution.keyword_name: Ensure Steep Approach Is Not Selected
resolution.generation_hint: Confirm that steep approach mode is not selected, so the standard caution envelope applies.

steps.text: the rate of descent is at most <rate of descent> feet per minute

resolution.generation_hint: Set the aircraft's rate of descent to the specified maximum value in feet per minute.

steps.text: the height above terrain is not between 10 and <height> feet

resolution.generation_hint: Set the aircraft's height above terrain to the specified maximum value in feet.

steps.text: a Mode 1 caution alert is not emitted at all

resolution.generation_hint: Assert that given descent rates and heights below the caution envelope thresholds, no alert is generated.

steps.text: a caution level Mode 1 alert arises

resolution.generation_hint: Trigger a caution level Mode 1 alert condition so that the associated aural and visual responses can be tested.

steps.text: an aural message "Sink Rate" shall be emitted

resolution.generation_hint: Assert that the specified aural message, such as 'Sink Rate', is emitted when the caution alert condition is active.

steps.text: a warning level Mode 1 alert arises

resolution.generation_hint: Trigger a warning level Mode 1 alert condition so that the associated aural and visual responses can be tested.

steps.text: an aural message "Pull Up" shall be emitted

resolution.generation_hint: Assert that the specified aural message, such as 'Pull Up', is emitted when the warning alert condition is active.

steps.text: the warning level Mode 1 alert condition persists

resolution.keyword_name: Maintain Warning Level Mode 1 Alert Condition
resolution.generation_hint: Sustain the warning level Mode 1 alert condition so that it can be verified as repeating or being silenced.

steps.text: the pilot didn't silence the alert

resolution.generation_hint: Verify that the pilot has not silenced the warning alert, ensuring the aural repeat continues.

steps.text: no higher priority alert is triggered

resolution.generation_hint: Confirm that no higher priority alert has been activated, so the current Mode 1 warning alert remains active and repeating.

steps.text: the aural message shall be repeated periodically

resolution.keyword_name: Verify Aural Message Is Repeated Periodically
resolution.generation_hint: Assert that the aural warning message is repeated at regular intervals while the condition persists and has not been silenced.

steps.text: a Mode 1 caution alert is active

resolution.generation_hint: Activate a Mode 1 caution alert so that the associated visual indicator can be verified.

steps.text: the TAWS shall trigger a yellow or amber indicator

resolution.keyword_name: Verify TAWS Yellow Or Amber Indicator
resolution.generation_hint: Assert that the TAWS system triggers a yellow or amber visual indicator when a Mode 1 caution alert is active.

steps.text: a Mode 1 warning alert is active

resolution.generation_hint: Activate a Mode 1 warning alert so that the associated visual indicator can be verified.

steps.text: the TAWS shall trigger a red indicator

resolution.generation_hint: Assert that the TAWS system triggers a red visual indicator when a Mode 1 warning alert is active.
